title: Matjaž Gams
text: Home * People * Matjaž Gams Matjaž Gams [1] Matjaž Gams , a Slovenian computer scientist and researcher in artificial intelligence at Department of Intelligent systems [2] , Jožef Stefan Institute , Ljubljana , member of the National Council of the Republic of Slovenia , its councillor for science and research, and member of AAAI , IEEE and ACM [3] . His research interests include machine learning , intelligent agents , multiple knowledge representations , AI and cognitive sciences . He also researched and published on computer chess and game topics, and along with Ivan Bratko due to their Ph.D. student Mitja Luštrek on pathology in heuristic search algorithms .
